ucs.title: [LLM] TA2541 aviation-lure → cloud-hosted VBS/MSHTA stager chain (Proofpoint cluster)
ucs.description: Hunts TA2541's signature delivery chain: aviation/aerospace/cargo-themed phishing links pointing to commodity cloud hosts (Google Drive, OneDrive, Discord CDN, MediaFire, GitHub) that drop an obfuscated VBS or LNK which spawns mshta/wscript/powershell to pull a crypter-wrapped commodity RAT (AsyncRAT, NetWire, WSH RAT, Parallax, Revenge RAT). This combination of cloud-hosted aviation lure + scripting-host download is characteristic of TA2541 / Operation Layover (Talos), distinguishing them from generic commodity-RAT operators.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats `summariesonly` count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("outlook.exe","chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","winrar.exe","7zg.exe","explorer.exe") AND Processes.process_name IN ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process IN ("*drive.google.com*","*docs.google.com*","*onedrive.live.com*","*1drv.ms*","*cdn.discordapp.com*","*mediafire.com*","*raw.githubusercontent.com*","*pastebin.com*","*bit.ly*","*hxxp*") OR Processes.process IN ("*Invoice*","*Cargo*","*Charter*","*Flight*","*Aviation*","*Boeing*","*Airbus*","*Aircraft*","*Quotation*","*RFQ*","*Manifest*","*BL*.vbs","*.vbs","*.hta","*.lnk")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` 
| join type=inner dest [| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest_category="ddns" OR All_Traffic.dest IN ("*duckdns.org","*hopto.org","*ddns.net","*no-ip.com","*ydns.eu","*linkpc.net") by All_Traffic.dest All_Traffic.src | rename All_Traffic.src as dest] 
| eval risk_score=80, mitre="T1566.002+T1218.005+T1059.005" 
| table firstTime lastTime dest user parent process_name process risk_score
ucs.rationale: TA2541 (Proofpoint) / Operation Layover (Talos) consistently targets aviation, aerospace, defense, transport and manufacturing with aviation-themed lures (RFQs, charter requests, cargo manifests) linking to cloud-hosted VBS/HTA/LNK loaders that beacon to DDNS providers. The join of (mail-client/browser → script host → cloud-host URL) followed within minutes by DDNS egress is much more specific tha

ucs.title: [LLM] TA2541 commodity-RAT staging via process hollowing into .NET host binaries (RegSvcs / AspNetCompiler / InstallUtil)
ucs.description: Detects TA2541's post-exploitation hallmark: a crypter spawned by wscript/powershell/mshta that hollows a benign signed .NET utility (RegSvcs.exe, RegAsm.exe, InstallUtil.exe, AspNetCompiler.exe, MSBuild.exe) which then beacons to DDNS infrastructure on common RAT ports (AsyncRAT, NetWire, WSH RAT, Parallax, Revenge RAT, njRAT). This parent→child→DDNS chain is distinctive to TA2541 because they consistently re-use this crypter family across aviation campaigns.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats `summariesonly` count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd values(Processes.process_path) as path from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("RegSvcs.exe","RegAsm.exe","InstallUtil.exe","AspNetCompiler.exe","aspnet_compiler.exe","MSBuild.exe","jsc.exe","vbc.exe","csc.exe") AND Processes.parent_process_name IN ("wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","explorer.exe") by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process 
| `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` 
| join type=inner host [| tstats `summariesonly` count values(All_Traffic.dest) as ddns_dest values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as ports from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest IN ("*duckdns.org","*hopto.org","*ddns.net","*no-ip.com","*sytes.net","*zapto.org","*linkpc.net") AND All_Traffic.dest_port IN (1604,1177,2404,4404,5552,6606,7707,8808,2000,5000) by All_Traffic.src | rename All_Traffic.src as host] 
| join type=outer host [| tstats `summariesonly` count from datamodel=Endpoint.Registry where Registry.registry_path="*\\CurrentVersion\\Run\\*" by host Registry.registry_value_name Registry.registry_value_data | rename Registry.* as *] 
| eval mitre="T1055.012+T1036.005+T1568", risk_score=90 
| table firstTime lastTime host user parent_process_name process_name process ddns_dest ports registry_value_data risk_score
ucs.rationale: Across Cisco Talos (Operation Layover) and Proofpoint TA2541 reporting, the actor's crypter unpacks AsyncRAT/NetWire/Parallax/Revenge/WSH RAT into a hollowed signed .NET binary (RegSvcs, RegAsm, AspNetCompiler, MSBuild) launched from a script-host parent — a pattern almost never produced by legitimate developers in a non-dev workstation. Correlating that hollowing with DDNS C2 on canonical AsyncRA
